title: Labradors
grooming: Labradors should be bathed every 6–8 weeks and groomed weekly to keep their coat healthy.
temperament: Labrador Retrievers are friendly, outgoing, and loyal dogs known for their gentle, playful and eager-to-please nature.
cardDesc: Labradors - Labrador Retrievers are friendly, outgoing, and loyal dogs. Zuma x Hoosier litter.
